name: Cold Roast Beef with Two Sauces (Wed.)
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon lemon zest, fresh or dried, finely grated
1 cup tomatoes reserved from Sunday Tomatoes Sauteed with Chipolte
6 tablespoons dressing reserved from Sunday Eggless Caesar
1 tablespoon grated parmesan cheese, or romano
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lemon zest, minced garlic, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
2. Slice the reserved meat and arrange on a platter.
3. Scatter the lemon-garlic mixture over the meat. Set aside while you make the sauces.
4. Finely chop the reserved tomatoes and mix with olive oil, red wine vinegar, and tomato paste. Season with salt and pepper. Set aside.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk the reserved Caesar salad dressing with grated parmesan cheese or romano and mayonnaise. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Serve the roast beef with the sauces on the side.
